languages.text:
While having less than 100% Wounds, Jae a 50% chance of receiving Bleed (7) at the start of her turn.
Torso's trauma increases damage dealt by Bleed or Toxin by 100%. If there's no Bleed currently on Jae, applies it respectively (power 7).

traits.locale_text:
While having less than 100% Wounds, Jae a 50% chance of receiving Bleed (7) at the start of her turn.
Torso's trauma increases damage dealt by Bleed or Toxin by 100%. If there's no Bleed currently on Jae, applies it respectively (power 7).

languages.text:
While Jae has less than 100% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, she has a 50% chance to suffer {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (7) at the start of her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
As soon as she starts suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, bleeding (7) is inflicted on her if she is not suffering from any levels of bleeding. She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} while suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

While having less than 100% Wounds, Jae a 50% chance of receiving Bleed (7) at the start of her turn.
Torso's trauma increases damage dealt by Bleed or Toxin by 100%. If there's no Bleed currently on Jae, applies it respectively (power 7).

traits.locale_text:
While Jae has less than 100% wounds, she has a 50% chance to suffer bleeding (7) at the start of her turn.
When she suffers {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, bleeding (7) is inflicted on her if she has no levels of bleeding inflicted. She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and toxin while having {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

While Jae has less than 100% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, she has a 50% chance to suffer {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (7) at the start of her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
As soon as she starts suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, bleeding (7) is inflicted on her if she is not suffering from any levels of bleeding. She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} while suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

While Jae has less than 100% wounds, she has a 50% chance to suffer bleeding (7) at the start of her turn.
As soon as she starts suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, bleeding (7) is inflicted on her if she is not suffering from any levels of bleeding. She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and toxin while suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

While Jae has less than 100% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g}, she has a 50% chance to suffer {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}bleeding{/g} (7) at the start of her {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}.
As soon as she starts suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, bleeding (7) is inflicted on her if she is not suffering from any levels of bleeding. She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} while suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

languages.text:
Пока у Джай менее 100% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}, с вероятностью 50% в начале своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} она получает {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g} (7).
Получив {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}сломанные ребра{/g}, Джай также получает кровотечение (7), если на ней еще нет ни одного уровня кровотечения. Она получает на +100% больше урона от кровотечения и {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}отравления{/g}, пока на нее наложен эффект {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}сломанные ребра{/g}.

As soon as she starts suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}, bleeding (7) is inflicted on her if she is not suffering from any levels of bleeding. She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} while suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

Пока у Джай менее 100% {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}, с вероятностью 50% в начале своего {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} она получает {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}кровотечение{/g} (7).

languages.text:
Tant que les {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} de Jae sont inférieures à 100 %, elle a 50 % de chances de subir l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Saignement{/g} (7) au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}.
Dès qu'elle commence à souffrir de {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}Côtes cassées{/g}, Saignement (7) lui est infligé si elle n'a pas encore reçu de niveaux de Saignement. Elle subit +100 % de dégâts supplémentaires de Saignement et {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Toxine{/g} sous l'effet de {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}Côtes cassées{/g}.

languages.text:
Jae'ın {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı %100'ün altındaysa {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turunun{/g} başında %50 olasılıkla {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}kanamaya{/g} (7) maruz kalır.
{g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}Kırık kaburgalara{/g} maruz kaldığında herhangi bir kanama seviyesinden muzdarip değilse kanamaya (7) uğrar. {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}Kırık kaburgalardan{/g} muzdaripken kanama ve {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} etkilerinden +%100 daha fazla hasar alır.

{g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}Kırık kaburgalara{/g} maruz kaldığında herhangi bir kanama seviyesinden muzdarip değilse kanamaya (7) uğrar. {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}Kırık kaburgalardan{/g} muzdaripken kanama ve {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toksin{/g} etkilerinden +%100 daha fazla hasar alır.

languages.text:
婕伊{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}低于100%时，其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时有50%的几率受到{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}（7）。
当她陷入{g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}肋骨骨折{/g}，同时无流血层数时，立即受到流血（7）。{g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}肋骨骨折{/g}期间，婕伊受到的流血和{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}伤害提高100%。

She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} while suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

婕伊{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}低于100%时，其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时有50%的几率受到{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}流血{/g}（7）。
当她陷入{g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}肋骨骨折{/g}，同时无流血层数时，立即受到流血（7）。{g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}肋骨骨折{/g}期间，婕伊受到的流血和{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒素{/g}伤害提高100%。

languages.text:
Mientras Jae tenga menos del 100 % de sus {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g}, tendrá una probabilidad del 50 % de sufrir {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}sangrado{/g} (7) al comienzo de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}.
En cuanto empiece a sufrir los efectos de las {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}costillas rotas{/g}, se le inflige sangrado (7) si no tiene ya ningún nivel de sangrado. Sufrirá un +100 % de daño adicional debido al sangrado y las {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxinas{/g} mientras tenga las {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}costillas rotas{/g}.

languages.text:
Hat Jae weniger als 100 % {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}, hat sie eine Chance von 50 %, zu Beginn ihres {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} mit {g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}Bluten{/g} (7) belegt zu werden.
Hat sie {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}gebrochene Rippen{/g}, wird sie mit Bluten (7) belegt, wenn sie noch nicht unter Bluten-Effekten leidet. Sie erleidet +100 % mehr Schaden durch Bluten und {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g}, solange sie {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}gebrochene Rippen{/g} hat.

She suffers +100% more damage from bleeding and {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}toxin{/g} while suffering from {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

Hat sie {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}gebrochene Rippen{/g}, wird sie mit Bluten (7) belegt, wenn sie noch nicht unter Bluten-Effekten leidet. Sie erleidet +100 % mehr Schaden durch Bluten und {g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}Gift{/g}, solange sie {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}gebrochene Rippen{/g} hat.

languages.text:
ジェイの{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}負傷{/g}が100%未満の間、彼女は{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}開始時に50%の確率で{g|Encyclopedia:BleedingEffect}出血{/g}（7）を受ける。
彼女が{g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}肋骨骨折{/g}を受け始めると同時に、いかなる出血レベルも受けていなければ出血（7）が彼女に付与される。{g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}肋骨骨折{/g}を受けている間、彼女は出血および{g|Encyclopedia:ToxinEffect}毒{/g}から受けるダメージが+100%増加する。
